instruction: <RETAIL>You are ivan_hernandez_6923 living in San Diego, 92133. You want to modify two items in an order you just received: a coffee machine and a laptop. For the coffee machine, you want to keep the capacity and type but change the pressure lower to 8 bar. If 8 bar is not possible, you want 9 bar. If 9 bar is not possible, you want 7 bar. If 7, 8, 9 are not possible, no exchange for the coffee machine. For the laptop, you want to exchange to the cheapest i7 or above, and you do not care about other specs. If a price difference is needed to pay, you would be angry but prefer gift card payment. If that is not possible, you would use the credit card. You are polite but brief and firm.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: modify two items in an order you just received
dialogue_state.initial_query: Modify two items in my recent order

hints.segment: for the coffee machine, change the pressure lower to 8 bar
hints.hint: For the coffee machine, I want to change the pressure to 8 bar

hints.segment: if 8 bar not possible, you want 9 bar
hints.hint: If 8 bar is not available, 9 bar will work

hints.segment: if 9 bar not possible, you want 7 bar
hints.hint: If neither 8 nor 9 bar is possible, then make it 7 bar

hints.segment: for the laptop, exchange to the cheapest i7 or above
hints.hint: For the laptop, I want to exchange it to the cheapest i7 or better

hints.segment: prefer gift card payment for any price difference; if not, use credit card
hints.hint: If there’s a price difference, I’d prefer to pay with a gift card. If not possible, use my credit card
